summary: Frontend-only smoke test of the ZeroFuel Expo/React Native app (web preview, 390x844). 16/17 listed acceptance flows verified end-to-end: splash auto-route, phone login (digit gating), OTP dev banner, wrong OTP inline error (111111), correct OTP 123456 -> KYC, KYC submit disabled without docs, KYC Skip -> Home (no PENDING_KYC banner), home elements (search, avatar, theme toggle, Scan-to-Unlock FAB, Nearest Hub card with 'Indiranagar 100ft Road'), QR FAB -> /qr-scan, Profile (wallet card + KYC pill + rows), Ride History shows 3 seeded rides, Wallet ₹500 top-up: 250 -> 750 reflected back on Profile, Help & Support FAQ list, Logout -> phone, dark-mode toggle on home, and Active Rental flow via QR Simulate-Scan (ticking Duration/Cost/Battery shown, Swipe-to-End completes and returns to Home). The Reserve-Vehicle-via-marker path was not directly clicked on the web map (web map stub does not expose individual marker DOM nodes), but the underlying startRental flow is identical to the verified Simulate-Scan path. Deprecated RN web warnings detected: shadow* props, props.pointerEvents, and React 19 element.ref warning from OTP TextInput callback refs.

issues: Map stub renders a small SVG only; user-location dot/markers are stacked on top-left in web preview — acceptable since native maps are used on device.

react_native_issues.issue: Console error: 'Accessing element.ref was removed in React 19. ref is now a regular prop.' fires on OTP screen render. Reference: /app/frontend/app/(auth)/otp.tsx:122-124 — ref callback on <TextInput> triggers the warning under react-native-web + React 19.

Deprecation warning: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' Used widely (avatar/searchPill/fab in home.tsx, statusPill/sheet in active.tsx). Migrate to style.boxShadow for web compatibility.
Deprecation warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents.' Used in /app/frontend/app/(main)/home.tsx (SafeAreaView topBar and loading View) and active.tsx topBar.

Deprecation warning in metro logs: '[expo-image-picker] ImagePicker.MediaTypeOptions have been deprecated. Use ImagePicker.MediaType or an array of ImagePicker.MediaType instead.' Reference: /app/frontend/app/(auth)/kyc.tsx:31 (mediaTypes: ImagePicker.MediaTypeOptions.Images).
Supervisor logs show expo@54.0.34 vs expected ~54.0.35, expo-font@14.0.11 vs ~14.0.12, expo-router@6.0.23 vs ~6.0.24. Non-blocking but should be aligned via `npx expo install --check`.

action_items: Move OTP TextInput ref assignment off the warning path: either use useRef<Array> with element-prop ref (react-native-web is forwarding ref correctly) or suppress by reading nativeRef via callback ref pattern that doesn't touch element.ref. Reference otp.tsx:122-124.
Replace `shadowColor/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius/shadowOffset` with `boxShadow` (or use Platform.select) in home.tsx, active.tsx, profile.tsx avatar/fab/walletCard/etc.
Replace `pointerEvents="box-none"` JSX prop with `style={{ pointerEvents: 'box-none' }}` in SafeAreaView usages on home.tsx and active.tsx (and similar).

Optional: expose stable testID per EV marker (e.g., `ev-marker-${vehicle.id}`) so Reserve-via-marker can be exercised on the web preview. Today the web Map stub renders markers as positioned children without individual testIDs.

Optional polish: the home 'Nearest Hub' card title and the 'EVs available · 320m away' sub-line currently render without a space between them in some flex states — text content reads correctly but consider explicit margin between Text nodes.
critical_code_review_comments: All interactive elements have stable testIDs — testing was straightforward.
Mocked API layer (/app/frontend/src/api/index.ts) and zustand stores (auth/rental/theme) are clean; PENDING_KYC banner and Reserve gating are correctly wired (home.tsx:167, vehicle-kyc-warning).
Web fallback in qr-scan.tsx is well-handled (Simulate Successful Scan button) so reviewers can experience the full rental flow.
Multiple files exceed simple-component size but none > 700 lines (home.tsx is ~520). OK.
Console warnings (shadow*, pointerEvents, element.ref) are noisy and indicate pending react-native-web/React 19 migrations.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of acceptance flows verified (Reserve-via-marker substituted with QR-simulate-scan which uses the same startRental path)

seed_data_creation: Used mocked seed only: phone 9876543210, OTP 123456, 3 seeded rides in history, initial wallet balance ₹250 (post-login).
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is a mocked-backend Expo Router app served at EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. Use viewport 390x844. Login: any 10-digit phone + dev OTP 123456. Skip on KYC makes user ACTIVE; Submit (requires both docs) sets PENDING_KYC and renders [data-testid=kyc-banner] on Home. Reserve-Vehicle-via-marker on the web map stub is not directly clickable (markers lack individual testIDs in web map); use [data-testid=qr-scan-fab] -> [data-testid=simulate-scan-button] to exercise the rental start path. Swipe-to-End thumb starts at left of [data-testid=swipe-to-end-rental] and must be dragged to ~95% of track width with mouse.down/move/up to fire onComplete.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no failing behaviors observed; only RN-web deprecation warnings worth addressing in a follow-up.
